# Best AI Code Tools for QA Testing in 2026

QA testing is essential but time-consuming. AI tools help you test faster and find more bugs!

Check out our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]]: AI-Powered Test Generation

[[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] generates comprehensive test cases automatically from your code.

### CodiumAI for QA Testing
- **Automatic test generation**: Write tests faster
- **Edge case detection**: Find bugs you might miss
- **Behavioral testing**: Test how your code actually behaves

**Try CodiumAI**: https://www.codium.ai/

---

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: Code Assistant for QA

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] helps you write test code and automation scripts faster.

### GitHub Copilot for QA
- **Write test scripts**: Generate test code quickly
- **Pattern recognition**: Suggest testing best practices
- **Documentation**: Explain test cases

**Try GitHub Copilot**: https://github.com/copilot
